summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 are fully implemented. The diff shows AppLayout.tsx redesigned with a larger, bolder VTH wordmark (text-2xl, font-black, tracking-widest) plus an emblem badge, new logo-specific OKLCH CSS tokens added to index.css for both light and dark modes, and corresponding Tailwind color/shadow utilities added to tailwind.config.js. No missing requirements were identified. Two unrequested additions were made beyond the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Guest Book' subtitle was added beneath the VTH wordmark in the header logo area.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for the VTH logo/wordmark to be larger and recolored. Adding a 'Guest Book' subtitle text element was not requested and goes beyond the specified scope.

hallucinated_features.description: An emblem badge (a styled amber-brown box containing 'VTH' text) was added alongside the wordmark as a second visual element.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specified updating the existing VTH logo/wordmark size and colors, not adding a separate emblem badge component. Adding a second distinct badge element was not requested.
